response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with Model Context Protocol (MCP) and TypeScript, aligning well with cloud and GenAI delivery. However, his direct experience with production-grade AI solutions and RAG architectures is less explicit, and his leadership in technical discovery sessions is not clearly highlighted.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript and Node.js, directly relevant to the role.
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, indicating familiarity with cutting-edge GenAI tools.
Strong background in cloud and developer tooling, including Kubernetes and AWS, which supports enterprise deployment.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, a core requirement for the role.
Experience with vector databases and RAG architectures is not clearly detailed in the resume.
Leadership in technical discovery sessions and stakeholder engagement is not prominently demonstrated.
